data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `project-planning` skill
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

Audit `skills/project-planning/` and capture the remaining normalization work.

Scope:

* review `SKILL.md` plus `templates/verification.md`
* verify the research-first / interview-only-when-needed workflow is still structurally clear
* check for opportunities to route more cleanly via workflows/references/templates
* align project-planning with the repo-local vision-first flow
* capture any stale paths or naming drift

Done when the remaining work is clear enough to implement directly from the issue.
